releaseCandidate.notes: Use sanitized values only. Do not commit secrets, OAuth codes, tokens, Play service account JSON, or private stream keys.

gates.title: Backend free-tier deployment
requiredEvidence: Neon Free project name or sanitized dashboard screenshot
Production env preflight JSON with secrets redacted
Backend smoke command output with /health, /health/ready, /app/compatibility, x-request-id, and database requirement

gates.title: Google OAuth and YouTube Live proof
requiredEvidence: Google OAuth consent screen configured screenshot
Real Google sign-in proof using the connected bot channel
Private test stream proof for live-chat discovery, send, delete, timeout, and hide
commands: Run private YouTube test stream from docs/YOUTUBE_MODERATOR_SETUP.md

gates.title: Android device or emulator QA
requiredEvidence: TalkBack, text scaling, high contrast, one-handed QA result

gates.title: Google Play Console and policy proof
requiredEvidence: Play Console subscription products for chatmod_pro_monthly and chatmod_creator_monthly
Play purchase validation proof with real Play Console credentials
Closed-testing install purchase and restore proof
Phone screenshots from real Android build
Play Data Safety submitted from final behavior

gates.title: Creator beta acceptance
requiredEvidence: Creator can sign in with Google
Creator can connect to an active YouTube Live chat
Bot runs from Android foreground service
Bot sends command and timer messages
Bot handles basic spam/banned-word rules in a real stream
Bot survives normal backgrounding and screen lock
Beta creator feedback says UX is polished enough to use without apology
commands: Run closed beta test from docs/PRODUCTION_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md
